interactions.taskSummary: [kub1-id:question-variant-placement] Where should a cross-variant DRA regression live?
interactions.summary: A behavior occurs in multiple structured allocator variants. Where should its regression case live so coverage does not drift?
interactions.detail: Mock inquiry for the post-evaluation graph. It carries no KUB1 target mechanism or solution.

interactions.taskSummary: [kub1-id:answer-variant-placement] Use the shared allocatortesting behavior table
interactions.summary: Put cross-variant behavior in structured/internal/allocatortesting/allocator_testing.go and confirm each applicable variant invokes the shared table with the required Features.
interactions.detail: Mock response grounded in PRs #137190 and #138885; it links to the mock question only after benchmark scoring.

reuse.evidence: Mock predecessor-to-successor reuse: PR #135022 used the shared allocatortesting workflow for externally visible constraint behavior. Post-evaluation showcase data only.

Mock verified reuse: PR #138885 applied equivalent candidate construction changes across all three variants and centralized regression behavior in allocatortesting. Post-evaluation showcase data only.
